list.shopName: 自动化测试_·商卡测试可预约状态·营业可预约·勿动
自动化测试_商卡测试营业状态_暂停接单·勿动
自动化测试_·商卡测试可预约·打烊可预约·勿动

queryList.1: hp_master: select id, module_activity_id, module_name, module_type, module_ethnicity, `status`, sort, sts, create_time, last_update_time, load_type, background, image_url_before_get, image_url_after_get, image_url_end, sort_rule, is_for_new_user, shop_link_type, shop_category_ids, shop_relation_type, filter_show_type, shop_show_type, market_tag_show_type, single_load_row_size, first_load_row_size, language_code,product_link_type,product_tag_ids,show_price_filter,price_threshold_min,price_threshold_max from module_activity_base where id = 2414 and sts = 1
queryList.2: hp_master: SELECT s.address_id, s.shop_id, s.shop_name, s.user_id, s.shop_information_id, s.shop_notice, s.shop_status, s.city, s.latitude, s.longitude, s.country, s.shop_img, s.shop_logo, s.bg_image, s.is_recommend, s.is_overtime, s.is_punctuality, s.is_pandaSend, s.is_onlinePay, s.startSendMoney, s.sendMoney, s.deliveryRange, s.delivery_type, s.isOnlineDerate, s.recommend_sort, s.country, s.make_time, s.predict_delivery_time, s.shop_type, s.discounts, s.per_capita_consume, s.pc_shop_img, s.pc_shop_img_bg, s.shop_label, s.is_user_pack, s.evaluation, s.expected_delivery_time_lower_limit, s.expected_delivery_time_upper_limit, s.peak_time, s.off_peak_time, s.full_sub_info, s.delivery_postcode_info, s.is_week_operation, s.delivery_faraway_type, s.auto_open_close, s.shop_border_url, s.shop_label_url, s.index_list_label, s.dynamic_sales, s.recommend_sort_easi, s.is_supermarket, e.praise_average, e.praise_average_manager, e.composite, e.composite_manager, e.shop_evaluation_num, s.shop_order_busy_status, s.new_order_prepare_extend_time, s.shop_order_stop_status, s.shop_order_stop_keep_time, s.shop_order_stop_start_time, msp.sort as moduleSort, msp.marketing_tag, sea.address, sea.shop_first_discount, sle.bg_image shopBgimageEn, sle.shop_name shopNameEn, sea.discount_on, sea.discount_rate, sea.shop_packet_price, sea.shop_packet_price_to_rate, sea.shop_packet_price_no_thr, sea.shop_packet_rate, sea.shop_packet_rate_no_thr, sea.exclusive, sea.product_discount_tag_desc, sea.product_discount, sea.discount_tag_exc, sea.discount_exc, sea.take_self_discount_tag_exc, sea.take_self_discount_exc, sea.activity_tag_type, sea.member_min_delivery_range, sea.member_max_delivery_range, sea.member_shop_price, sea.product_discount_promote_type, sea.tobacco_shop, sea.max_delivery_range_meter, sea.easi_max_delivery_range_meter, sea.min_new_user_sku_price, sea.new_shop_label_url, sea.preorder_closed_support, sea.preorder_open_type, sea.shop_order_stop_time, sea.new_channel_label_url FROM module_activity_link_shop msp LEFT JOIN shop s ON msp.shop_id = s.shop_id INNER join shop_lang_extra sle on sle.shop_id=s.shop_id and sle.is_del=0 and sle.lang='CN' and sle.is_supported=1 LEFT JOIN evaluation e ON s.shop_id = e.shop_id LEFT join hp_shop_site_config ssc ON ssc.shop_id = msp.shop_id LEFT JOIN hp_shop_search_middle sea ON sea.shop_id=s.shop_id WHERE msp.module_activity_base_id=2414 AND s.is_del = 0 AND ssc.site = 'HP' AND ssc.visible = 1 AND e.is_del = 0 AND (s.shop_type = 0 OR s.shop_type = 2) AND msp.sts=1 AND s.audit_status=1 GROUP BY s.shop_id ORDER BY if(s.shop_order_stop_status=1, 1, s.shop_status), s.recommend_sort, s.shop_name
queryList.3: hp_master: select shop_border_id,`name`, url, size204_url, new_url from shop_border where `name` = '独家' and sts = 1 and `type` = 1 and status = 1 limit 1
queryList.4: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'EXCLUSIVE_SHOP_SWITCH' limit 1
queryList.5: hp_master: select shop_id, fence_latlng from hp_shop_delivery_fence where shop_id in ( 387549545 , 160288176 , 669770737 , 863876353 , 221864167 , 855828829 , 617846488 , 335765650 , 422389118 , 345263066 , 199713339 ) and delivery_type = 1
queryList.6: hp_master: SELECT user_id,user_name,user_nick,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,role_id,user_Invitation_code,create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_status,user_salt,user_sex,audit_status,register_source,is_work,real_name,user_push_token,bs,tmp_uid,tmp_money,tmp_total_money,tmp_integral,tmp_order_counts,tmp_pmid,receiving_max,country,user_code,user_email,city_name,is_add_insure,country_code,is_add_zego,phone_number,run_type,base_salary,calling_code,is_tip_show,is_auto_receive_order,is_can_take_order,delivery_remark,qiyu_remark,is_special_driver,first_name,last_name,employee_type,hourly_salary,salary_rule_type,billing_cycle,send_count,shift_type,contract_status,id_photo_front,id_photo_back,star,driver_score,driver_score_frozen_expiry_date,reg_area_id,user_ali_open_id,user_wx_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,allow_promote,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,phone_number_mask,user_email_mask FROM user WHERE user_id=1398716814
queryList.7: hp_master: SELECT a.shop_id, b.discount_sn, b.date_type, b.day_limit, b.time_limit, b.time_slot_type, b.crowd, c.sub_state, c.break_type, d.city FROM hp_delivery_discount_shop a LEFT JOIN hp_delivery_discount b ON a.discount_sn = b.discount_sn LEFT JOIN hp_activity_config c ON b.activity_sn = c.activity_sn LEFT JOIN shop d on a.shop_id=d.shop_id WHERE b.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND b.discount_status = 1 AND b.start_time <= 1749116069497 AND b.end_time > 1749116069497 AND a.shop_id IN ( 221864167 , 199713339 ) AND 1749116069497 between a.start_time and a.end_time
queryList.8: hp_master: select shop_id,week, start_time, end_time from week_time where shop_id in ( 335765650 , 422389118 , 199713339 ) and is_del=0
queryList.9: hp_master: select shop_id,operate_time_id,start_time,end_time,is_default,start_time_str,end_time_str from operate_time where shop_id in ( 335765650 , 422389118 , 199713339 ) and is_del =0
queryList.12: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'MAKE_TIME_DEFAULT' limit 1
queryList.13: hp_master: select rec_id ,shop_id ,take_self_discount_tag_exc ,take_self_discount_exc ,take_self_discount_limit ,take_self_discount_threshold ,discount_tag_exc ,discount_exc ,delivery_discount_limit ,discount_threshold ,product_discount_tag_desc ,product_discount_threshold ,product_discount ,product_discount_promote_type ,take_self_discount_dimension ,discount_dimension from hp_shop_promotion_middle where shop_id in ( 387549545 , 160288176 , 669770737 , 863876353 , 221864167 , 855828829 , 617846488 , 335765650 , 422389118 , 345263066 , 199713339 )
queryList.14: hp_master: SELECT imd.index_module_detail_id, imd.module_activity_id, im.module_name, imd.content, imd.img_url, imd.sort, imd.title, imd.type, imd.url, imd.postcode, imd.parent_title, imd.sub_title, imd.visible_type, im.is_auto_associate_city, imd.dimension, im.operate_area_id, imd.is_show_bubble , imd.bubble_content , imd.ad_type , imd.absolute_sort, imd.ad_id, imd.icon_color, imd.img_url_new, imd.jump_data, imd.small_img_url FROM index_module_detail imd LEFT JOIN index_module im ON im.index_module_id = imd.index_module_id WHERE im.city_name = '九江市' AND im.status = 1 AND im.operate_area_id = 0 AND im.visible_type in(0,2) AND imd.visible_type in(0,2) AND imd.sts = 1 AND imd.`status`=1 AND im.module_type = 24 AND im.language_code = 'CN' order by imd.sort DESC,imd.create_time desc
queryList.15: hp_master: select city_id, city, time_zone, is_fix_point, sort_distance_wight, city_name_en, is_open_faraway, activity_status, inlet_tips, share_picture, travel_mode,is_use_index_module,age_limit,city_shop_sort,city_shop_evaluation_config,is_use_index_module_en, take_meal_after_out,driver_operation_distance_limit_type,open_languge_page,map_resource, polling_on_off,excise_calculate_type,is_del,city_code,delivery_map_resource,order_tax_type, tab_voucher,deliverable_action from city_config where city = '九江市' and is_del = 0 limit 1
queryList.16: hp_master: /*FORCE_MASTER*/ select user_id,user_name,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,user_Invitation_code,user_code,user_ali_open_id, create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_nick,role_id,user_status,user_salt,user_push_token,bs,audit_status,real_name, delivery_new_user_status,user_push_token,user_email,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,user_email_mask ,receiving_max,country,is_add_insure,is_add_zego,is_tip_show,country,run_type,is_can_take_order,is_auto_receive_order,is_special_driver,calling_code ,salary_rule_type,contract_status,star,user_wx_openid,user_ali_open_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,register_source,user_email from user where user_id=1398716814 and role_id=0 and is_del=0
queryList.19: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'SUPPORT_TAG_WEIGHT' limit 1
queryList.20: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'DEGRADE_TAG_WEIGHT' limit 1
queryList.21: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'ONE_MAN_MEAL_SORT_WEIGHT' limit 1
queryList.22: hp_master: SELECT id,weight,time_period,user_tag,shop_tag_id,open_status,is_del,create_time,update_time,create_user,modify_user FROM hp_degrade_weight WHERE (is_del = 0 AND open_status = 1) limit 1000
queryList.23: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'SUPPORT_TAG_ID' limit 1
queryList.24: hp_master: select a.tag_id,b.shop_id from tag as a,`tag_link` as b,tag_top t where a.tag_id = b.tag_id and a.parent_id = t.rec_id and t.`status` = 1 and a.is_enable = 1 and b.is_del = 0 and a.tag_id in ( 6000 , 6002 , 6003 , 3778 , 3898 , 6090 , 3772 , 3773 , 3774 ) and b.shop_id in ( 387549545 , 160288176 , 669770737 , 863876353 , 221864167 , 855828829 , 617846488 , 335765650 , 422389118 , 345263066 , 199713339 )
queryList.25: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'OVER_AFFORD_ORDER_LIMIT_CITY_DOWN_RATE' limit 1
